zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice de Hastings於1180年出生在英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓時，她的父親Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings30歲，母親Lady Maud de Flamville27歲。她於1194年與Godfrey de Louvain在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1246年5月15日在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 伊斯頓享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice de Hastings于1180年出生在英国艾可蕾托 伊斯頓时，她的父亲Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings30岁，母亲Lady Maud de Flamville27岁。她于1194年与Godfrey de Louvain在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1246年5月15日在英国英格兰艾可蕾托 伊斯頓享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice de Hastings was born in 1180, in Little Easton, Essex, England, her father, Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings, was 30 and her mother, Lady Maud de Flamville, was 27. She married Godfrey de Louvain in 1194, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 15 May 1246, in Little Easton, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Hastingsが1180年にイギリスエセックスリットル エアストンで生まれた時，父Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastingsは30歳，母Lady Maud de Flamvilleは27歳であった。1194年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでGodfrey de Louvainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1246年5月15日にイギリスイギリスエセックスリットル エアストンで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice de Hastings(이)가 1180년 영국 에세스 리틀 이스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Maud de Flamville(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1194년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Godfrey de Louvain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 5월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 이스트에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice de Hastings родилась в 1180 г. в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Fitzwilliam de Hastings было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud de Flamville, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Godfrey de Louvain в 1194 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 мая 1246 г. в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.
